name: vscode-lsp-mcp-bridge
displayName: GA - VS Code LSP MCP Bridge
description: GA - Expose VS Code language intelligence as a local MCP server for AI coding tools. Made by Georgiana Alba (GA).
author: Georgiana Alba

mcpServerDefinitionProviders.label: GA - VS Code LSP MCP Bridge

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with LSP MCP Bridge
walkthroughs.description: Expose the current VS Code workspace language features to AI coding tools through MCP.

steps.title: Check the local bridge
steps.description:
Open a workspace with the language extension you want to use, then run the status command to confirm the local MCP endpoint is available.

[Show bridge status](command:vscode-lsp-mcp-bridge.showStatus)

steps.title: Copy an MCP client config
steps.description:
Copy a ready-to-use MCP server configuration for Codex, VS Code/GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, or another HTTP MCP client.

[Copy MCP client config](command:vscode-lsp-mcp-bridge.copyClientConfig)

steps.title: Route the gateway to this workspace
steps.description:
External MCP clients use the stable gateway endpoint. When several VS Code windows are open, route new external-client sessions to the current workspace.

[Route gateway to this workspace](command:vscode-lsp-mcp-bridge.useWorkspace)

steps.title: Open an MCP client config file
steps.description:
Open a common MCP client configuration file and copy the matching bridge snippet to the clipboard. Missing files are created only after confirmation.

[Open MCP client config file](command:vscode-lsp-mcp-bridge.openClientConfig)

steps.title: Keep writes explicit
steps.description: Read-only tools work by default. Validated formatting/completion writes and explicit commands remain disabled until `vscodeLspMcpBridge.enableWriteTools` is enabled, and every mutation still requires VS Code approval.

vscodeLspMcpBridge.autoStart.description: Start the local bridge server when VS Code finishes startup.

vscodeLspMcpBridge.host.description: Host for the local bridge server. Only 127.0.0.1 is accepted.

vscodeLspMcpBridge.port.description: Stable local gateway port for external MCP clients. VS Code/GitHub Copilot auto-registration uses the current window endpoint.

vscodeLspMcpBridge.connectionFile.description: Optional path for the connection file. Empty uses ~/.vscode-lsp-mcp-bridge/connection.json.

vscodeLspMcpBridge.enableWriteTools.description: Enable validated formatting/completion edits and explicitly requested provider commands. Every mutation still requires VS Code approval; generic provider WorkspaceEdit results remain preview-only.

vscodeLspMcpBridge.notificationDurationM.description: How long extension status notifications stay visible in the status bar, in milliseconds.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: The bridge refuses to start unless the workspace is trusted.

scripts.compile: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run bundle
